## Layoutable.skip property

Whether to skip rendering of the element. If `true`<!-- -->, the element has to be skipped and `layout()` should not be called. If `false` it will apply the regular rendering technique.  false

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly skip?: boolean;
```
